description: Searches the cached example library for rule examples that match the supplied tool name and intent, returning each example with its relevance score, exported rule properties, and parsed CLI parameters.

intent.description: The user and agent intent used to search and rank matching examples.

agentIntent.description: The normalized intent produced by the agent for tool discovery, routing, or execution.

userIntent.description: The original intent as expressed by the user.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of examples to return in the search results.

namespace.description: A namespace used to scope the example search to a specific plugin group or category.

threshold.description: The minimum relevance score required for an example to be included in the results.

toolName.description: The unique identifier of the tool for which examples are being searched.

name: g4.FindExamples

examples.description: An array of scored example results, each containing the matched rule, its relevance score, exported tool properties, and parsed CLI parameters.

rule.description: The matched rule example. The PluginName field is excluded because it is already implied by the tool name.

score.description: The relevance score assigned to the matched example.

toolParameters.description: The parsed CLI parameters extracted from the rule argument, keyed by parameter name.

toolProperties.description: The exported rule properties derived from the matched example, keyed by property name.

title: Find G4 Examples
